Who We Are

WE ARE
CIRCLE
SOLUTIONS

We are a customer acquisition company specializing in retail energy and fiber internet door-to-door campaigns. We represent the nation's leading brands — and we do it better than anyone else.

Our edge? Our people. We recruit driven individuals, train them to be elite, promote them fast, and build leaders who go on to run their own operations.

500+
Weekly Enrollments
97%
Client Retention
∞
Growth Ceiling
⚡
Retail Energy Campaigns
D2D enrollment in deregulated energy markets — residential and small business.
🌐
Fiber Internet D2D
Door-to-door subscriber acquisition for major fiber broadband providers.
🎓
World-Class Training
Ground-up training in product knowledge, compliance, sales, and leadership.
🚀
100% Promoted From Within
Every leadership position is filled by someone who started in the field.

🏆
Leadership photo

🏆
Career Growth

Our management training program takes you from field agent to team leader to manager — and beyond. No ceiling, no limits.

Training · Leadership · Growth

YOUR
MOVE.
YOUR
MOMENT.

Every person in our organization started exactly where you are. Here's how fast things can move when you're willing to put in the work.

01
Field Agent

Start in the field. Full training provided. Earn uncapped commissions from your very first day. No experience required — just drive.

02
Team Leader

Top performers move up fast. Lead a team, earn overrides, build real management skills. Most agents reach this level within 90 days.

03
Manager / Partner

Run your own campaigns. Own territories. Become a business partner. Six-figure income is a reality — not a promise — for our leaders.

Ready to Level Up?

JOIN THE
CIRCLE.

Whether you're a brand looking for a field acquisition partner — or an individual ready to build something real — we're ready for you.

Retail energy & fiber internet customer acquisition — powered by elite door-to-door teams.
